description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has two jobs: check and gpu. The check job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, macos-latest, and windows-latest, and performs steps to set up R, install dependencies, build and check a package, and run tests. The gpu job runs on a self-hosted runner and builds and runs a Docker image with GPU support.
